system.flavor: You coax the plants in the ground to grow rapidly, and they spring forth like well trained animals.
system.effect:
Summon [X]: Create 1d3+1 vines in range, which can be created under characters. A vine deals 2 piercing damage to any character in its area when it is created, but a character can only take this damage once a turn.

Vine
Summon (6)
Summon Effect vine counts as difficult terrain. Bloodied characters must spend an additional +1 space of movement (3 total) to exit its space, or +2 spaces (4 total) if they are in crisis. A character can destroy a vine by using the interact action in an adjacent space, but leaves difficult terrain in its space.
